calendar.matters:
Joint Petition For Order Approving Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Mar-27-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Mar-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dobrov for Alan Choy. Gilbert Jay for Ron Choy and Mark Fujiwara.

Counsel stated that they are talking about having informal mediation with the family members, requested an evidentiary hearing (no more than two half days) and a cutoff date for discovery. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provisions was continued to March 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. (day 1 of the evidentiary hearing) and April 3, 2015 (day 2 of the evidentiary hearing), in Dept. 204. Witness lists and exhibit lists are to be filed by March 2, 2015. The discovery cutoff date is February 27, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Nov-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for (respondents & co-trustees) Mark Fujiwara & Ronald Choy. Michael Dobrov for and with petitioner Alan Choy.

Mr. Jay stated that the property is under three million dollars and that they qualify for Pro Bono Mediation. Mr. Dobrov stated that his client would like to proceed with mediation, that he needs to withdraw as counsel for personal reasons and asked for mediation to be set or scheduled after his client has counsel. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 29, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 5, 2014. The petition to determine validity of trust provision was continued to and the Parties are to return on November 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Mr. Dobrov agreed to remain as counsel for the first round of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy M. Jones. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Provision
